# position(date:)

**Instance Method**

Returns a position representing the time specified.

## Declaration

```swift
func position(date: Date) -> OSLogPosition
```

## Discussion

If there are multiple occurrences of the same time, the method returns the earliest occurrence.

## Accessing Position

- **position(timeIntervalSinceEnd:)**: Returns a position representing time since the end of the time range that the entries span.
- **position(timeIntervalSinceLatestBoot:)**: Returns a position representing time since the last boot in the series of entries.
